response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified "Mugen Climax" via on-screen text and performed a search for lyrics using the original artist (Seiko Oomori). Lyrics found. 2. Identified the MC segment where no vocal music is played. 3. Identified "Aragau Kimi e no Chinkonka" via on-screen text at the end of the video. Performed a search for lyrics using the credited composer (Himemori Luna), but official lyrics were not found in the search results.
response.global_summary: This video is a live performance featuring the VTuber Himemori Luna, accompanied by other performers. It starts with a group performance of the song "Mugen Climax", followed by an MC/talk segment, and concludes with the start of a performance of the original song "Aragau Kimi e no Chinkonka".

scenes.description: A group of performers (VTubers) dancing and singing the song "Mugen Climax". On-screen text indicates the song title.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
さよなら
甘い街
私をくれた人
泣き癖
笑いあい
理屈のない喜び
曖昧
未完成の
過ち悟ったけど
それは恋の季節
閃きは戻らない
シナリオ通りのカルマ
飛び越えてきた人生
望みがなくなって
愛だけ残ったの
それぞれの幸せ振りかざしても
倒れないふたりで立っていようね
鮮やかでいてね
そのままでいてね
消えない幻
夢幻クライマックス
最後の夜
エンドレスを刻め
斬新に
抱きしめても壊れないくらい
強くなりすぎたから
あなたはわかんない
おかえりからの孤独
それでも無神経に
季節が巡っていく
いつも褒めてくれた叱って

scenes.description: The performance ends and the main performer, Himemori Luna, talks to the audience, introducing the next segment and reflecting on the performance.
The song "Aragau Kimi e no Chinkonka" begins. On-screen text identifies the song title and composer (Himemori Luna).
